category_sources: source_facts.description identifies a web application framework for C; official kore.io homepage describes Kore as a web application platform for scalable concurrent web processes in C or Python.
display_name_sources: Official kore.io homepage and docs use the project name Kore; source_facts.name is kore.
docs_sources: Dedicated official docs.kore.io documentation for the 4.2.x releases.
repo_sources: Official kore.io/source states Kore source code is hosted on git.kore.io and gives clone form https://git.kore.io/reponame.git; official git.kore.io/kore page lists git clone https://git.kore.io/kore.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official kore.io homepage list C/Python web platform features including TLS, WebSocket, PostgreSQL, and privilege separation.
